task: Keep the common-indicator inspect JSON backbone stable while richer workspace fields are added.
verification: bash -lc 'uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert data[\"record_count\"] == 5; assert data[\"records\"][1][\"label\"] == \"form\"; assert data[\"records\"][3][\"kind\"] == \"module\"; assert data[\"records\"][4][\"kind\"] == \"form\""'
notes: Starter JSON-contract guard for the smallest fixture before `container.inspect.json` hardens.

task: Keep the common-print-form inspect JSON backbone stable while richer workspace fields are added.
verification: bash -lc 'uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert data[\"record_count\"] == 5; assert data[\"records\"][2][\"label\"] == \"module\"; assert data[\"records\"][4][\"kind\"] == \"form\"; assert data[\"records\"][4][\"size_policy\"] == \"mirror\""'
notes: Second baseline JSON-contract guard for the richer inspect backbone.

task: Keep the text-mode inspect CLI path healthy while the richer workspace-facing JSON grows.
notes: Protects the user-facing inspect route while JSON output evolves.

task: Expose descriptor links, record roles, codecs, and workspace-relative paths on the common-indicator inspect backbone.
notes: Hardens the per-record machine-readable backbone on the smallest verified fixture.

task: Expose split-form continuation summaries without changing the raw-first inspect baseline.
notes: Guards continuation-chain metadata on the complex fixture before holdout confirmation.

task: Expose pointer-link and record-layout summaries on the common-indicator inspect backbone.
verification: bash -lc 'uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); layout=data[\"record_layout\"]; assert data[\"pointer_links\"] == []; assert layout[\"prefix_size\"] == 16; assert layout[\"total_size\"] == 3657; assert layout[\"record_spans\"][0] == {\"index\": 0, \"header_start\": 16, \"header_end\": 47, \"body_start\": 47, \"body_end\": 559}; assert layout[\"record_spans\"][-1][\"body_end\"] == 3657"'
notes: Adds a machine-readable record-layout summary without changing the baseline record list.

task: Write the canonical container.inspect.json artifact during unpack without changing the inspect backbone shape.
notes: Materializes the current inspect backbone into the unpack workspace so downstream tools can consume a file, not only CLI stdout.

task: Keep the explicit inspect JSON file-export CLI path healthy while the workspace backbone grows.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin --json -o "$tmpdir/container.inspect.json" >/dev/null && python3 -c "import json, pathlib; data=json.loads((pathlib.Path(\"$tmpdir/container.inspect.json\")).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert data[\"record_count\"] == 5; assert data[\"descriptor_links\"][0][\"payload_index\"] == 3; assert data[\"record_layout\"][\"total_size\"] == 3657"'
notes: Protects the new file-export CLI path without changing the default inspect stdout behavior.

task: Allow inspect tooling to read container.inspect.json directly from an unpack directory.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && uv run formbin inspect "$tmpdir/unpack" --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert data[\"record_count\"] == 5; assert data[\"descriptor_links\"][0][\"payload_index\"] == 3; assert data[\"record_layout\"][\"total_size\"] == 3657"'
notes: Makes the unpack workspace inspect artifact directly consumable by the existing inspect command.
